message:
feat(beads): augment Aegis Engine with critical UX improvements and explicit test criteria

Deepened the Aegis Engine execution plan (ft-l5em3) by incorporating:
- Scrollback buffer integration semantics for the SPMC data plane.
- Cross-chunk variable-width boundary tracking for SIMD scanners.
- Operator tunable risk configurations (alpha/delta) for PAC-Bayes backpressure.
- Density and entropy synthesis to avoid false-positive anomaly blocking on valid repeating data.
- New 'ft debug dump-aegis' telemetry command for off-line diagnostics.
- Comprehensive end-to-end and fuzz testing mandates.
